matching_rule: One base case matches when a promoter or gene-body variant is visible in the current sample. Three additional case families match when the whitelist mean beta, the gene-name-related mean beta, or the all-numeric mean beta resolves to low, medium, or high methylation. Variant prediction rules receive the decoded sample GT, zygosity, ALT dosage, and site REF -> ALT definition; curated allele rules take precedence only when the sample genotype carries the relevant allele dosage.
disclaimer: Predictive theses in this database are literature-guided research summaries derived from the bundled gene interpretation bundle. They are designed for exploratory synthesis in the UI and should not be treated as diagnostic or therapeutic claims.
concrete_variant_prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests a TPMT thiopurine pharmacogenomics thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to thiopurine methylation, active nucleotide accumulation, myelosuppression risk, and immunosuppressant pharmacogenomics and TPMT thiopurine toxicity context, Mercaptopurine/azathioprine dosing biology. Treat this as pathway triage until the exact allele has external classification and phenotype support.

This specific marker is curated as TPMT reduced-function allele marker. rs1800460 (TPMT*3B) is curated as a TPMT marker for TPMT thiopurine toxicity context, Mercaptopurine/azathioprine dosing biology. Read it through genotype dosage, phenotype context, and the thiopurine methylation, active nucleotide accumulation, myelosuppression risk, and immunosuppressant pharmacogenomics pathway rather than as a stand-alone deterministic result.
variant_prediction_rules.sample_change_template: This sample matched rs1800460 (TPMT*3B) at site definition {change} with GT {gt_raw} decoded as {genotype} ({zygosity}). Anchor the TPMT prediction to genotype dosage {allele_dosage} rather than REF -> ALT presence alone. Dosage-specific conclusions should be softened when GT, depth, balance, or genotype quality are uncertain.

cases.label: Gene variant found
cases.prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests a TPMT thiopurine pharmacogenomics thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to thiopurine methylation, active nucleotide accumulation, myelosuppression risk, and immunosuppressant pharmacogenomics and TPMT thiopurine toxicity context, Mercaptopurine/azathioprine dosing biology. The local TPMT bundle is thiopurine pharmacogenomics oriented. Interpret markers through exact allele class, zygosity, ancestry, phenotype, and assay context rather than as stand-alone deterministic calls. TPMT variants can alter or tag thiopurine methylation, active nucleotide accumulation, myelosuppression risk, and immunosuppressant pharmacogenomics; effect direction depends on allele class, tissue, dosage, and biological context.

cases.label: Gene variant found + high whitelist mean beta

This pattern leans toward stronger regulatory restraint or reduced local accessibility around the locus.
